english: Is the implementation of a carbon tax in India feasible given its current economic and energy landscape?
hindi: भारत में कार्बन कर की प्रभावी लागू करना संभव है या नहीं, देश की वर्तमान आर्थिक और ऊर्जा परिदृश्य के दृष्टिकोण से?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் கார்பன் தரவுக்கு செயல்படுத்துவது தற்போதைய பொருளாதார மற்றும் ஆற்றல் நிலப்பரப்பின் பார்வையில் சாத்தியமா?
vietnamese: Liệu việc thực hiện thuế carbon ở Ấn Độ có thể thực hiện được hay không, xét từ góc độ hiện tại của nền kinh tế và hệ thống năng lượng của đất nước?
correct_answer: The implementation of a carbon tax in India is feasible if accompanied by policies that support economic growth, improve energy efficiency, and promote the use of renewable energy sources.
expected_failure: Why AI might fail: The question requires a nuanced understanding of the complex relationships between economic, energy, and environmental factors, which can be challenging for AI models to capture accurately.
